name: Biometric Attendance Sync
script:
# Biometric Attendance Sync
# Called by Frappe Scheduler to pull attendance data from all active devices
# Configure sync interval in Biometric Device doctype

import frappe
from frappe import _

def sync_biometric_attendance():
    """Pull attendance data from all active biometric devices"""
    devices = frappe.get_all("Biometric Device",
        filters={"is_active": 1},
        fields=["name", "device_type", "ip_address", "port", "api_endpoint", "api_key"]
    )
    
    for device in devices:
        try:
            sync_device(device)
        except Exception as e:
            frappe.log_error(
                title="Biometric Device Sync Error",
                message=f"Device: {device.name}\nError: {str(e)}"
            )
            frappe.db.rollback()

def sync_device(device):
    """Sync a single device"""
    # Placeholder: Implement vendor-specific API calls here
    # Supported vendors: ZKTeco, Mantra, BioMatric
    
    if device.api_endpoint:
        # Cloud-based device with REST API
        import requests
        headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {device.api_key}"} if device.api_key else {}
        # response = requests.get(f"{device.api_endpoint}/attendance", headers=headers, timeout=30)
        # Process response and create Biometric Attendance Log records
        pass
    else:
        # On-premise device with SDK (e.g., ZKTeco)
        # Connect via socket to device.ip_address:device.port
        pass
    
    
    # For each punch record:
    # 1. Check if Biometric Attendance Log already exists (dedup)
    # 2. If not, create Biometric Attendance Log with status="Pending"
    # 3. Update device.last_sync = frappe.utils.now_datetime()
    
    frappe.db.set_value("Biometric Device", device.name, "last_sync", frappe.utils.now_datetime())

def process_pending_logs():
    """Process pending biometric logs to create attendance records"""
    pending_logs = frappe.get_all("Biometric Attendance Log",
        filters={"status": "Pending"},
        fields=["name", "biometric_id", "punch_datetime", "person_type"]
    )
    
    for log in pending_logs:
        try:
            create_attendance_from_log(log)
        except Exception as e:
            frappe.log_error(
                title="Biometric Attendance Processing Error",
                message=f"Log: {log.name}\nError: {str(e)}"
            )

def create_attendance_from_log(log):
    """Create Student Attendance from biometric log"""
    # Look up Student by biometric_id
    student = frappe.db.get_value("Custom Student",
        {"biometric_id": log.biometric_id}, "name")
    
    if student:
        # Check if attendance already exists for this student on this date
        punch_date = frappe.utils.getdate(log.punch_datetime)
        existing = frappe.db.exists("Student Attendance", {
            "student": student,
            "date": punch_date,
            "status": "Present"
        })
        
        if not existing:
            attendance = frappe.get_doc({
                "doctype": "Student Attendance",
                "student": student,
                "date": punch_date,
                "status": "Present"
            })
            attendance.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    
    # Mark log as processed
    frappe.db.set_value("Biometric Attendance Log", log.name, "status", "Synced")

frappe.db.commit()
